details.test: Task 1: Buy most powerful 3-axis under 60000 with >=800x400 table
Task 2: Configure entry-level CNC mill under 45000 with >=7.5kW spindle, ATC, coolant
Task 3: Order two cheapest in-stock main spindles for ProMill 500 (2022)
Task 4: Register for earliest online beginner-level CNC training after 2024-09-01
Task 5: Contact nearest authorized service dealer within 100 km of 60601
Task 6: Download English user manual and safety instructions for VMC 850
Task 7: Favorite newest aerospace titanium 5-axis case study and copy link
Task 8: Subscribe to cheapest maintenance plan under 200/month with annual on-site inspection
